title: Gorbachev and Reagan: A Historic Meeting
story: Handshakes and hope filled the air as Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev touched down in America in 1987. On December 7, he arrived for a crucial summit with US President Ronald Reagan. The two powerful leaders were set to discuss big issues like reducing nuclear weapons. This meeting marked an important step towards ending the Cold War tensions between their countries.
activity_question: Who did Mikhail Gorbachev meet with during his visit to America?
follow_up_question: What was one major topic Gorbachev and Reagan planned to discuss?

title: The Grateful Dead's Final Curtain Call
story: A legendary musical journey ended in 1995. The Grateful Dead, a beloved American rock band, decided to break up on December 7. This tough choice came after the heartbreaking loss of Jerry Garcia, their lead guitarist and singer. Garcia's unique sound and spirit had been central to the band's magic for three decades.
activity_question: What event led to The Grateful Dead breaking up?
activity_choices: The lead singer losing his voice
bonus_fact: The Grateful Dead were known for their dedicated fans, called 'Deadheads', who often followed the band on tour.

title: A Saint's Journey Begins
story: In a small Irish village called Gartan, a special baby was born on December 7, 521. This child grew up to become Saint Columba, a brave missionary who spread Christianity to Scotland. Columba's life of adventure and faith started on this winter day, setting the stage for his future as a revered figure in both Irish and Scottish history.
activity_question: Where was Saint Columba born?
follow_up_question: What country is Gartan located in?

title: A Star-Gazer's Birth
story: In 903, a baby boy was born who would grow up to map the night sky. Abd al-Rahman al-Sufi came into the world on December 7 in Rey, Persia. This future astronomer would spend his life studying the stars, helping others understand the wonders above. His work still inspires stargazers today!
activity_question: Where was Abd al-Rahman al-Sufi born?
follow_up_question: What do astronomers study?

title: Jack Jouett: Midnight Rider for Freedom
story: Galloping through the night, Jack Jouett became a hero of the American Revolution. Born in Virginia in 1754, Jouett later spotted British troops advancing to capture patriot leaders. He raced on horseback to warn Thomas Jefferson and others, helping them escape just in time. Jouett's brave ride on December 7 echoed Paul Revere's famous midnight journey.
activity_question: What did Jack Jouett do to become a hero?
activity_choices: He raced on horseback to warn Thomas Jefferson
He fought against the British troops
He signed the Declaration of Independence
He became the first president of Virginia
activity_answer: He raced on horseback to warn Thomas Jefferson
follow_up_question: Why do you think Jack Jouett's warning was so important?
